title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Prudential Life

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Prudential Life
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Prudential Life! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Prudential Life:
ICICI Prudential Life is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life!
